originStory: WadeGlobal AI was built by William Wade as the infrastructure engine behind practical AI systems, agents, automation, CRM, follow-up, governance, reporting, and brand presence for businesses that have outgrown scattered tools.
positioning: WadeGlobal AI builds AI systems, agents, automation, and operational infrastructure for service businesses, then deploys that work through governed operating systems, CRM, n8n, reporting, LocalPresenceOS, and BrandPresenceOS.

proofGrounds.name: Ascent Cleaning Solutions
proofGrounds.role: Service-business proving ground for lead capture, CRM, follow-up, LocalPresenceOS, operations, and reporting.

proofGrounds.name: Wishing Ain't Doing Enough
proofGrounds.role: Separate leadership and execution brand that informs BrandPresenceOS authority, audience, events, offers, and conversion paths.

proofGrounds.name: WadeGlobal AI
proofGrounds.role: Core infrastructure engine and proof ground for AI operations, agent orchestration, workflow governance, and system reliability.

audiences: Service-business owners that need AI systems, agents, automation, and operational infrastructure across sales, operations, admin, and governance
Coaches, consultants, speakers, educators, and leadership brands that need content, offers, events, community, delivery, and CRM infrastructure
Organizations that need governed AI operations, bridge-mediated intelligence, workflows, documentation, and audit-ready deployment
targetMarkets: home service and facility service companies

sectors.name: WGAI Leader
sectors.buyer: Coaches, consultants, speakers, educators, and leadership brands

automationBlueprint.purpose: Turn website interest into a trackable operating-system event instead of a loose inbox message.
